title: euphrasia officinalis var. minor
intro: Euphrasia officinalis var. minor, also known as Eyebright, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eyebright include relief from eye infections, allergies, and sinusitis, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and improve respiratory function. Eyebright is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or eye drops, and can be found in various herbal supplements and remedies.
